ul.li: Zero-Copy Architecture: Data resides in KBNS pools from DMA receipt to Application processing.
Single Producer Single Consumer: All rings are SPSC to avoid atomic contention.
Interrupt-Free: 100% busy-poll mode on isolated cores.
Deterministic Latency: All heap allocations performed at boot (init phase).
Alignment: posix_memalign to 64B for all pool metadata.
ARP: Static and dynamic cache entry support.
Filtering: MAC-based destination dropping in software.
Checksum: SIMD optimized IP header check.
LPM: Longest Prefix Match via 16-8-8 bit trie.
Timestamping: Hardware TSC based RTT calculation.
NUMA: All buffers allocated on socket_id of the NIC.
Prefetching: Software prefetch of packet headers 2 descriptors ahead.
Affinity: App threads pinned via pthread_setaffinity_np.
